steps.title: Focus on point of view
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize whose point of view the novel uses. The correct sentence must discuss the novel Kaikeyi and explicitly name the character whose perspective shapes the retelling.

steps.title: Reject off-target details
steps.content:
• Choice B wrongly treats The Ramayana as the point-of-view holder and focuses on villainy.
  • Choice C describes heroic portrayal, not narrative perspective.
  • Choice D describes the original epic rather than the novel's point of view.
The remaining choice directly states that the retelling is from Kaikeyi's point of view. The answer is A.
